items.title_en: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple's CarPlay
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 现已支持苹果 CarPlay，可在车载系统中使用
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI has expanded ChatGPT's integration to Apple's CarPlay, allowing drivers to access the AI assistant directly through their car's infotainment system. The feature enables hands-free conversational AI while driving, deepening the OpenAI–Apple partnership announced in 2025.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI 将 ChatGPT 接入苹果 CarPlay，驾驶者可直接通过车载娱乐系统使用 AI 助手。该功能支持免提对话式 AI 交互，进一步深化了 OpenAI 与苹果于 2025 年建立的合作关系。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Bonsai: The First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs
items.title_zh: 1-Bit Bonsai：首个商业可用1比特LLM
items.summary_en: PrismML: PrismML has released 1-Bit Bonsai, described as the first commercially viable 1-bit large language models. The models leverage extreme quantization to achieve drastically reduced memory and compute requirements while maintaining usable performance.
items.summary_zh: PrismML：PrismML 发布 1-Bit Bonsai，称其为首个商业可用的 1 比特大语言模型。该模型采用极端量化技术，在大幅降低内存和计算需求的同时保持可用性能。

items.title_en: PrismML launches Bonsai: First commercially viable 1-bit LLMs
items.title_zh: PrismML 发布 Bonsai：首个商业可用的 1-bit 大语言模型，AI 推理成本有望大幅降低
items.summary_en: PrismML: PrismML announced Bonsai, claimed to be the first commercially viable 1-bit large language models, enabling advanced AI to run efficiently on edge devices. 1-bit quantization dramatically reduces memory and compute requirements, potentially democratizing AI deployment on consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: PrismML：PrismML 发布 Bonsai，宣称为首批商业可用的 1-bit 大语言模型，可在端侧设备上高效运行高水平 AI 能力。1-bit 量化大幅降低内存和算力需求，有望推动 AI 在消费级硬件上的大规模普及。

items.title_en: AI seed startups are commanding significantly higher valuations in 2026
items.title_zh: AI 种子轮估值大幅走高：2026 年投资人只看 AI，$10M 融资普遍对应 $40M+ 估值
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: AI seed startups in 2026 are routinely raising $10M rounds at $40–45M post-money valuations — up from $5M at $25M just two years ago. Investors at YC W26 Demo Day showed near-exclusive appetite for AI companies, reflecting intense competition for early-stage AI deals.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：2026 年 AI 种子轮普遍以 1000 万美元融资对应 4000–4500 万美元估值收场，比两年前翻了近一倍。YC W26 演示日上，投资人几乎只关注 AI 公司，早期 AI 创业赛道竞争白热化。

items.title_en: Yupp AI shuts down less than a year after launch, despite $33M from a16z crypto
items.title_zh: AI 模型比价平台 Yupp 上线不足一年宣布关闭，此前已从 a16z 获融资 3300 万美元
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Yupp, a crowdsourced AI model comparison platform that let users test 800+ AI models for free, is shutting down less than a year after launch despite raising $33M from a16z crypto. Co-founders cited market challenges in sustaining the model as a cautionary tale for free-tier AI services.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：AI 模型比较平台 Yupp 宣布关闭，上线不足一年，此前曾获 a16z 加密部门 3300 万美元融资。该平台允许用户免费测试逾 800 款 AI 模型，最终因商业模式难以为继而停止运营。

items.title_en: Samsung Galaxy S26's AI photo app can 'sloppify' your memories
items.title_zh: 三星 Galaxy S26 AI 相册应用可将照片「低质化」处理
items.summary_en: The Verge: Samsung's new Galaxy S26 features a controversial AI photo editing tool that critics say 'sloppifies' memories by over-processing images with generative AI effects. The feature highlights growing debate over AI-generated alterations to personal photography and the ethics of default AI edits.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：三星新款 Galaxy S26 搭载了一项颇受争议的 AI 照片编辑功能，批评者认为该功能通过生成式 AI 过度处理图片，导致珍贵记忆「低质化」。这一功能再次引发关于 AI 默认编辑个人照片的伦理争论。

items.title_en: Amazon Alexa+ adds conversational food ordering via Uber Eats and Grubhub
items.title_zh: 亚马逊 Alexa+ 新增对话式点餐功能，支持 Uber Eats 和 Grubhub 外卖服务
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Amazon's Alexa+ AI assistant now supports conversational food ordering through Uber Eats and Grubhub, allowing users to place orders naturally as if talking to a waiter — part of Amazon's broader strategy to make Alexa+ a practical AI agent for everyday tasks.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：亚马逊 Alexa+ AI 助手新增对话式点餐功能，支持通过 Uber Eats 和 Grubhub 下单，用户可以像与服务员对话一样自然地完成外卖订购，是亚马逊将 Alexa+ 打造为日常 AI 代理助手战略的重要一步。

items.title_en: Uber and WeRide expand driverless robotaxi service in Dubai
items.title_zh: Uber 与文远知行扩大迪拜无人驾驶出租车运营，可通过 Uber App 直接叫车
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Uber and Chinese AV company WeRide have launched driverless robotaxi operations in Dubai's commercial districts, bookable through the Uber app. The expansion marks a key milestone for both companies in the Middle East market and advances WeRide's international autonomous driving deployment.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Uber 与中国自动驾驶公司文远知行在迪拜商业区正式推出无人驾驶出租车服务，用户可直接通过 Uber App 叫车。此次扩张是双方在中东市场的重要里程碑，也推进了文远知行国际化自动驾驶部署进程。

items.title_en: Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only
items.title_zh: 微软：Copilot 仅供娱乐用途
items.summary_en: Microsoft: Microsoft has added prominent disclaimers to Copilot stating it is intended for entertainment purposes only, distancing the product from enterprise reliability expectations. The move reflects growing legal caution around AI assistant liability and accuracy, particularly as AI tools are increasingly used in professional contexts.
items.summary_zh: 微软：微软为 Copilot 添加显著免责声明，表示该产品仅供娱乐用途，与企业级可靠性预期划清界限。此举反映出围绕 AI 助手法律责任与准确性的日益谨慎，尤其是在 AI 工具被广泛用于专业场景的背景下。

items.title_en: Runway launches $10M fund and Builders program for early-stage AI startups
items.title_zh: Runway 推出 1000 万美元基金及 Builders 计划，扶持早期 AI 创业公司
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: AI video generation startup Runway announced a $10 million fund and a new Builders program to support early-stage AI startups. The initiative offers capital, access to Runway's creative AI APIs, and mentorship, as Runway expands beyond video tools into an AI ecosystem platform.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：AI 视频生成初创公司 Runway 宣布设立 1000 万美元基金并推出 Builders 计划，支持早期 AI 创业公司。该计划提供资金、Runway 创意 AI API 访问权及导师辅导，标志着 Runway 正从视频工具向 AI 生态系统平台扩展。

items.title_en: OpenAI raises $122B in funding to accelerate frontier AI globally
items.title_zh: OpenAI 完成 1220 亿美元融资，加速全球前沿 AI 布局
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI announced a historic $122 billion funding round—the largest in AI history—including $3 billion from retail investors, to expand frontier AI development globally, invest in next-generation compute infrastructure, and meet surging demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI services.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 宣布完成 1220 亿美元融资，创 AI 史上最大规模融资纪录，其中包括 30 亿美元来自零售投资者。此次融资将用于推进全球前沿 AI 开发、投资下一代算力基础设施，并满足 ChatGPT、Codex 及企业 AI 服务的快速增长需求。

items.title_en: Anthropic: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
items.title_zh: Anthropic：Claude Code 用户触达用量限额的速度远超预期
items.summary_en: The Register: Anthropic has acknowledged that Claude Code users are hitting usage limits significantly faster than the company anticipated. The surge reflects strong adoption of its agentic coding tool but has also surfaced latent bugs that silently multiply API costs by 10-20x, causing billing surprises for some users.
items.summary_zh: The Register：Anthropic 承认 Claude Code 用户触达用量限额的速度远超预期，反映出其智能编码工具的强劲需求。与此同时，已发现隐性 Bug 可将 API 成本悄然放大 10-20 倍，导致部分用户账单异常。

items.title_en: AI data centres can warm surrounding areas by up to 9.1 degrees C
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心可使周边区域气温升高最多 9.1 摄氏度
items.summary_en: New Scientist: A new study finds that the massive heat output from AI data centres can raise temperatures in surrounding areas by up to 9.1 degrees Celsius. As AI infrastructure scales globally, researchers warn of localized climate impacts on communities near large compute clusters, adding environmental scrutiny to the AI buildout.
items.summary_zh: New Scientist：新研究发现，AI 数据中心产生的大量废热可使周边区域气温升高最多 9.1 摄氏度。随着 AI 基础设施在全球快速扩张，研究人员警告大型计算集群附近社区将面临局部气候影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pardus Browser - a browser for AI agents without Chromium
items.title_zh: Pardus Browser：专为 AI 智能体打造的非 Chromium 浏览器
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source project introduces Pardus Browser, a lightweight browser built specifically for AI agents that avoids the overhead of Chromium. Designed to give agents clean, controllable web access, it aims to reduce resource consumption and improve determinism for automated browser-based AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开源项目 Pardus Browser 发布，专为 AI 智能体打造，绕开 Chromium 的庞大体积。该浏览器旨在为智能体提供轻量、可控的网页访问能力，降低资源消耗，提升自动化浏览器工作流的确定性。

items.title_en: The Inference Shift – How Cheap Chips Could Put Frontier AI in Everyone's Hands
items.title_zh: 推理转型：廉价芯片如何让前沿 AI 走进千家万户
items.summary_en: Analysis: An in-depth analysis argues that falling inference chip costs are about to democratize access to frontier AI models. As specialized inference hardware becomes commoditized, the author predicts a shift where running powerful models locally or cheaply in the cloud becomes widely accessible within 1-2 years.
items.summary_zh: 分析：一篇深度分析文章指出，推理芯片成本的快速下降即将打破前沿 AI 的访问壁垒。随着专用推理硬件进入大规模量产阶段，作者预测在 1-2 年内，在本地或低价云端运行强大模型将成为普遍可及的能力。

items.title_en: Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens
items.title_zh: 通用 Claude.md——大幅削减 Claude 输出 Token
items.summary_en: Community: A GitHub repository proposes a universal Claude.md configuration that significantly reduces Claude's output token usage. The approach applies prompt-level instructions to suppress verbosity and redundant formatting, helping developers cut API costs. Gained 293 upvotes on Hacker News.
items.summary_zh: 社区：一个 GitHub 仓库提出通用 Claude.md 配置方案，通过提示级指令抑制冗余输出，有效降低 Claude API Token 消耗，帮助开发者节省成本。该帖在 Hacker News 获得 293 点赞。

items.title_en: Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context
items.title_zh: Google 发布 2 亿参数时序基础模型，支持 16k 上下文
items.summary_en: Google Research: Google Research released TimesFM, a 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context length. The model achieves strong zero-shot forecasting across diverse domains including finance, weather, and energy, available open-source on GitHub.
items.summary_zh: Google Research：Google Research 发布 TimesFM，一个拥有 2 亿参数和 16k 上下文长度的时序基础模型。该模型在金融、天气、能源等多领域展现出强大的零样本预测能力，已在 GitHub 开源。

items.title_en: Claude usage limits hitting faster than expected
items.title_zh: Claude 用量上限比预期更快触达
items.summary_en: Community: A Reddit thread on r/ClaudeCode reports that Claude API usage limits are being reached faster than anticipated by developers. Users discuss patterns in token consumption and strategies to manage limits, reflecting growing adoption of Claude in production coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: 社区：Reddit r/ClaudeCode 帖子报告称开发者比预期更快触达 Claude API 用量上限。用户讨论 Token 消耗规律及管理策略，反映 Claude 在生产编程工作流中的使用量快速增长。

items.title_en: Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview
items.title_zh: Ollama 预览版开始使用 Apple MLX 加速
items.summary_en: Ollama: Ollama announced a preview of MLX-powered inference on Apple Silicon, enabling significantly faster local LLM performance on Mac devices. The integration leverages Apple's MLX framework to accelerate model execution natively on M-series chips.
items.summary_zh: Ollama：Ollama 宣布在 Apple Silicon 上推出基于 MLX 框架的推理加速预览版本，大幅提升 Mac 本地大模型运行速度。该功能充分利用苹果 M 系列芯片的神经引擎，为本地 AI 推理带来显著性能提升。

items.title_en: GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash
items.title_zh: GitHub 撤回决定，取消 Copilot PR 广告植入
items.summary_en: GitHub: GitHub reversed its controversial decision to embed promotional content into Copilot pull request descriptions after significant backlash from developers. The feature had drawn criticism for mixing AI suggestions with advertising. GitHub confirmed the rollback following community pressure.
items.summary_zh: GitHub：在开发者强烈反对后，GitHub 撤回了将推广内容嵌入 Copilot PR 描述的争议性决定。该功能因将 AI 建议与广告混合而饱受批评，GitHub 在社区压力下确认回滚。
